title: Sieving procedure for the fractionation of microplastic sized powders
author: Putzu, Mara
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This standard operating procedure (SOP) has been developed to fractionate microplastics (1-1000 µm, ISO/TR 21960:2020)   via a sieve cascade with mesh sizes of 500, 100 and 50 µm. The samples are plastic particles in powder form. Plastic particles were able to pass a certain mesh size, stayed between sieves of two mesh sizes or were not able to pass a sieve with a certain mesh size. The SOP is specifically designed for dry sieving.
steps_raw: This standard operating procedure (SOP) has been developed to fractionate microplastics (1-1000 µm, ISO/TR 21960:2020)   via a sieve cascade with mesh sizes of 500, 100 and 50 µm. The samples are plastic particles in powder form. Plastic particles were able to pass a certain mesh size, stayed between sieves of two mesh sizes or were not able to pass a sieve with a certain mesh size. The SOP is specifically designed for dry sieving.
